name: Cherry-Sweet Potato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine and mix flour, sugar, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, and pumpkin spice.
2. Add eggs, vegetable oil, and milk to the dry ingredients. Stir until smooth.
3. Blend in sweet potatoes, raisins, chopped nuts or walnuts, and Maraschino cherries (or yams). Mix well.
4. Pour batter into a greased bread pan that has been lightly floured.
5. Bake at 325°F for approximately 1 hour. Check the bread at the 50-minute mark by inserting a tester or toothpick; it should come out clean when done.
